_comment: GapSight Assessment File — Canonical Reference
This file defines the input format for the GapSight compliance scoring engine.
Use it with the GitHub Action or the gapsight-check CLI for automated CI checks.
SECTIONS:
profile        — Describes your AI system context (role, risk, deployment stage, frameworks).
inputs          — All metric values, governance answers, and human oversight responses.
PROFILE FIELDS:
role               — 'provider' (builds AI) or 'deployer' (uses third-party AI).
gpai_flag           — true if this is a General-Purpose AI / foundation model.
risk_category       — 'high-risk', 'limited', or 'gpai'.
deployment_status   — 'pre-deployment', 'post-deployment', or 'pilot'.
frameworks_selected — Array of framework IDs: 'eu_ai_act', 'nist_ai_rmf', 'iso_42001'.
METRIC INPUTS (float, 0–1 unless noted):
overall_accuracy              — Proportion of correct predictions.
f1_score                      — Weighted F1 score.
auc_roc                       — Area under ROC curve.
test_set_size                 — Integer, number of test samples.
test_set_representative       — 'yes', 'partial', or 'no'.
demographic_parity_diff       — Fairness: demographic parity difference (lower is better).
equalized_odds_diff           — Fairness: equalized odds difference (lower is better).
disparate_impact_ratio        — Fairness: disparate impact ratio (higher is better, target ≥0.80).
bias_mitigation_applied       — Boolean: whether bias mitigation was applied.
bias_mitigation_method        — String describing the mitigation method used.
data_drift_score              — Robustness: data drift score (lower is better).
concept_drift_score           — Robustness: concept drift score (lower is better).
adversarial_robustness_score  — Robustness: adversarial robustness (higher is better).
drift_monitoring_active       — Boolean: is drift monitoring active in production?
last_retrain_date             — ISO date string of last model retrain.
explanation_coverage           — Explainability: coverage score (higher is better).
explainability_method          — String: 'SHAP', 'LIME', 'Integrated Gradients', 'Feature Importance', or 'None'.
explanations_available_to_users — Boolean: are explanations available to end users?
model_card_exists              — Boolean: does a model card exist?
instructions_for_use_documented — Boolean: are instructions for use documented?
GPAI-SPECIFIC INPUTS (only when gpai_flag is true):
training_flops                  — Number: total training FLOPs (e.g., 1e24).
training_data_summary_published — Boolean.
copyright_policy_status         — String.
model_evaluations_conducted     — Boolean.
adversarial_testing_conducted   — Boolean.
systemic_risk_notification_sent — 'yes' or 'no'.
HUMAN OVERSIGHT (q1–q5, each 'yes', 'partially', or 'no'):
q1 — Can operators understand outputs and limitations?
q2 — Is there an override or stop mechanism? (Critical — 'no' triggers CRITICAL_FAIL)
q3 — Have operators completed training?
q4 — Are escalation procedures documented?
q5 — Does the system actively prevent automation bias?
GOVERNANCE (each has a 'status' field: 'yes', 'in_progress', 'partial', 'no', 'not_applicable'):
risk_management_system         — Risk Management System in place?
ai_policy                      — AI Governance Policy?
technical_documentation         — Technical Documentation (Annex IV)?
data_governance_policy          — Data Governance Policy?
automated_logging               — Automated Logging and Record Keeping?
quality_management_system       — Quality Management System?
third_party_vendor_assessment   — Third-Party and Supply Chain Management?
